attributes.action: Require the Prime Minister to give direct answers at PMQs
attributes.additional_details: PMQs is intended to allow MPs to scrutinise the Prime Minister and hold the Government to account. When questions are not directly answered, this reduces transparency and weakens confidence in the process. Clearer expectations would improve accountability and public trust.
attributes.background: We want changes to parliamentary procedure to ensure that responses given by the Prime Minister during PMQs address the question asked. This could include strengthening guidance on relevance or allowing follow-up where a question has not been answered.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce standards for answers to PMQs to be enforced by the Speaker
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762566
